data.body: 235a PASS+signed+claimed after 6 rounds (each surfaced real classification facts: sign_review write-gated hybrid, list_tools conditional registration, reconcile dual-gate READONLY+JIRA_SYNC, run_workflow 4th hybrid ALLOW_LLM, section-count consistency, held-out-test-in-Files). Authored 10-test held-out suite (3 happy shown). Dispatching implementer for gen_mcp_reference.py.
